text.title: Segment-Aware Design System Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use it when the input shape changes or before scaling a pilot.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the product serve ≥2 user segments with differing tone/copy on the same functional core?

conclusion.verdict: Single-segment product — use vanilla design system.
Merge segments to ≤5 before applying the methodology.
Segments diverge functionally — needs multi-tenancy, not a design system.

branch.when: multi_segment == true AND segments_count <= 5 AND functional_divergence == false

example.trace: multi_segment=true → segments_count=2 → functional_divergence=false → token dimension + prop retrofit.
